districts.name: Starting Gate
districts.summary: Horses, wagers, and sworn witnesses crowd beneath copper starting bars.
districts.featureDescription: Copper rings tighten when a rider intends to break the declared terms.

districts.name: Witness Square
districts.summary: Umpires hear disputes in public while dust preserves its own account underfoot.
districts.featureDescription: Wheel marks appear across the clay top whenever somebody describes the disputed finish.

districts.name: Chariot Yards
districts.summary: Axles, reins, horse-song, and competitive advice fill long red workshops.
districts.featureDescription: The cradle rocks gently whenever a nearby wheel remembers speed.

landmarks.name: yesterday's finish line
landmarks.description: A white line crosses empty grass; hoofbeats arrive each dusk from a race nobody saw begin.
